@font-face {
	font-family: "chatBotIcons";
	src: url("data:application/vnd.ms-fontobject;charset=utf-8;base64,?#iefix") format("embedded-opentype"),
url("data:application/font-woff;charset=utf-8;base64,") format("woff"),
url("data:font/woff2;charset=utf-8;base64,") format("woff2"),
url("data:application/x-font-ttf;charset=utf-8;base64,") format("truetype");
}

.chatBot {
	line-height: 1;
}

.chatBot:before {
	font-family: chatBotIcons !important;
	font-style: normal;
	font-weight: normal !important;
	vertical-align: top;
}

.chatBot-add-round:before {
	content: "\f101";
}
.chatBot-add:before {
	content: "\f102";
}
.chatBot-ArrowDown:before {
	content: "\f103";
}
.chatBot-ArrowUp:before {
	content: "\f104";
}
.chatBot-Back:before {
	content: "\f105";
}
.chatBot-backupic-cross:before {
	content: "\f106";
}
.chatBot-calendar:before {
	content: "\f107";
}
.chatBot-check_circle:before {
	content: "\f108";
}
.chatBot-check:before {
	content: "\f109";
}
.chatBot-clock:before {
	content: "\f10a";
}
.chatBot-close:before {
	content: "\f10b";
}
.chatBot-cross:before {
	content: "\f10c";
}
.chatBot-DownArrow:before {
	content: "\f10d";
}
.chatBot-edit_pencil_pwa:before {
	content: "\f10e";
}
.chatBot-edit_pencil:before {
	content: "\f10f";
}
.chatBot-error_small:before {
	content: "\f110";
}
.chatBot-experience:before {
	content: "\f111";
}
.chatBot-ic-bot:before {
	content: "\f112";
}
.chatBot-ic-chat:before {
	content: "\f113";
}
.chatBot-ic-cross:before {
	content: "\f114";
}
.chatBot-ic-mini:before {
	content: "\f115";
}
.chatBot-location:before {
	content: "\f116";
}
.chatBot-pencil:before {
	content: "\f117";
}
.chatBot-restart:before {
	content: "\f118";
}
.chatBot-rupee:before {
	content: "\f119";
}
.chatBot-Search:before {
	content: "\f11a";
}
.chatBot-star:before {
	content: "\f11b";
}
.chatBot-tick:before {
	content: "\f11c";
}

  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  width: var(--naukriDrawerWidth);

  height: 100%;
  transition: all 0.2s linear; }
  .naukri-drawer.right {
    right: calc(-1 * var(--naukriDrawerWidth)); }
  .naukri-drawer.left {
    left: calc(-1 * var(--naukriDrawerWidth)); }
  .naukri-drawer .drawer-overlay {
    width: 100%;
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    opacity: 0;
    visibility: hidden;
    transition: all 0.1s linear; }
  .naukri-drawer .drawer-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    background: #ffffff;
    height: 100vh;
    padding: 28px 81px 28px 24px;

    .naukri-drawer .drawer-wrapper.scroll {
      overflow: scroll;
      scrollbar-width: none; }

        display: none; }
    .naukri-drawer .drawer-wrapper .close {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      position: absolute;
      top: 18px;
      right: 28px;
      transition: all 0.1s linear; }
      .naukri-drawer .drawer-wrapper .close .cross {
        font-size: 20px; }
      .naukri-drawer .drawer-wrapper .close:hover {
        color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); }
  .naukri-drawer.open.right {
    right: 0; }
  .naukri-drawer.open.left {
    left: 0; }
  .naukri-drawer.open .drawer-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
    visibility: visible; }
